metadata.title: Aidin Sahebi — Front-End Developer & UI Designer
metadata.description: Portfolio of Aidin Sahebi — Front-End Developer & UI Designer specializing in React, Next.js, and modern web applications.

hero.title: Front-End Developer & UI Designer
hero.pitch: I build modern, responsive, and user-friendly web applications with a focus on performance, maintainability, and clean design.

home.featuredSubtitle: Featured projects from government, enterprise, and municipal platforms.
home.ctaSubtitle: Open to frontend development, UI design, and product collaboration opportunities.
home.servicesTitle: Design, build, and ship digital products
home.servicesSubtitle: From UI concepts to production-ready front-end — end to end.

design.title: UI / UX Design
design.description: Wireframes, prototypes, and polished interfaces for web platforms — especially government and enterprise products.

development.title: Front-End Development
development.description: Modern, responsive apps with React, Next.js, and scalable component architecture.

systems.title: Design Systems & CMS
systems.description: Reusable UI systems and custom CMS front-ends like Spirit Portal at Niafam.

proof.title: GitHub & Dribbble
proof.subtitle: Live code and design shots — proof beyond the case studies.

about.title: About Me
about.description: Front-End Web Developer with experience in building modern, responsive, and user-friendly web applications. Skilled in UI Design and passionate about creating fast, clean, and reliable user experiences.
about.description2: Proficient in React, Next.js, and JavaScript, with a strong focus on performance, maintainability, and scalability. Continuously learning and adapting to new technologies to deliver high-quality digital products and effective solutions to complex challenges.
about.summary: Frontend Developer & UI Designer with several years of experience in designing and developing modern web applications and user interfaces.
about.highlight1: Successfully delivered 30+ UI/UX projects for government websites, managing the entire process from design to frontend implementation.
about.highlight2: Experienced in developing scalable frontend solutions and contributing to proprietary CMS platforms, including Spirit Portal at Niafam.
about.highlight3: Currently working on enterprise-grade financial management systems using Next.js.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Case studies from government, enterprise, and municipal platforms I've designed and built.
